tools.name: movscript_list_productions
tools.description: List productions in the current or specified project when the active production is missing or ambiguous.

tools.name: movscript_read_current_production
tools.description: Read the selected production plus focused read-only context: current scene moments, project creative references, project asset slots, content units, keyframes, and optional script text.

tools.name: movscript_create_production_proposal
tools.description: Create an empty local production_proposal review draft for the current production. This does not modify backend project entities.

tools.name: movscript_inspect_production_proposal_context
tools.description: Inspect the current production_proposal draft, current production reference, user request, and compact proposal node summaries before editing the draft.

tools.name: movscript_get_production_proposal
tools.description: Read one local production_proposal draft as structured JSON.

tools.name: movscript_list_production_proposal_nodes
tools.description: List scene moments, creative references, asset slots, content units, and keyframes inside a production_proposal draft.

tools.name: movscript_upsert_proposal_scene_moment
tools.description: Create or update one scene moment inside the local production_proposal draft.

tools.name: movscript_upsert_proposal_reference
tools.description: Create or update one creative reference usage inside the local production_proposal draft.

tools.name: movscript_upsert_proposal_asset
tools.description: Create or update one asset slot inside the local production_proposal draft.

tools.name: movscript_upsert_proposal_content_unit
tools.description: Create or update one content unit inside the local production_proposal draft.

tools.name: movscript_upsert_proposal_keyframe
tools.description: Create or update one keyframe inside the local production_proposal draft.

tools.name: movscript_delete_production_proposal_node
tools.description: Delete one scene moment, creative reference, asset slot, content unit, or keyframe from a production_proposal draft.

tools.name: movscript_submit_production_proposal
tools.description: Write the final local production_proposal review draft for UI comparison and human confirmation. This does not modify backend project entities.
